headline: SpaceX went from three consecutive rocket explosions and near-bankruptcy in 2008 to the biggest IPO in history
summary: Elon Musk once gave SpaceX less than a 10% chance of surviving.

headline: Michael Burry buys another beaten-down forgotten fintech stock
summary: Michael Burry posted on his Substack on June 12 to explain his latest moves, and his most pointed commentary was reserved for PayPal (PYPL). The famous investor, best known for calling the 2008 housing crash, has been adding to his position in the digital payments company as part of a broader ...
